slide1.subtitle: We build critical high-availability platforms and decouple monoliths into robust microservices using our own open-source modular framework.

slide2.subtitle: We automate critical corporate decision-making using predictive algorithms, risk analysis, and intelligent business information processing.

about.title: High-performance IT solutions
about.subtitle: Kplian provides specialized consulting services to establish the technological pillars that support our clients' growth and corporate technological progress.

bullet1.title: Open Source Specialization
bullet1.desc: We offer products of the highest quality, optimizing costs by avoiding restrictive proprietary licenses and hidden expenses.

bullet2:.title: Cutting-edge Technology
bullet2:.desc: We develop customized solutions using advanced methodologies and languages tailored to your business.

services.title: What we do?
services.subtitle: We accompany your organization with a complete portfolio of IT consulting and custom software.

item1.title: Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP)
item1.desc: We know that software must adapt to companies and not the other way around. We have extensive experience in the development and implementation of integrated ERP modules for large corporations.

item2.title: Software Design & Development
item2.desc: Specific needs require custom development. We have agile and innovative processes executed by a team of senior engineers focused on high quality standards.

item3.title: Responsive Web Design
item3.desc: We create fluid interactive interfaces that work on computers and mobile devices. Using clean native code, guaranteeing speed and stellar performance.

item4.title: Business Intelligence (BI)
item4.desc: We facilitate accurate and rapid decision-making. We provide BI services under the principle of "correct information in a timely, transparent, and clear manner".

item5.title: Information Security
item5.desc: Comprehensive risk analysis and corporate computer security. We accompany you in threat identification, vulnerability mitigation, and secure deployment.

item6.title: VoIP Phone Systems
item6.desc: We plan, provision, and implement corporate Unified Communication solutions and robust VoIP platforms adapted to the size and demand of your business.

item7.title: Automations with n8n & Low-Code
item7.desc: We optimize your business processes by connecting your favorite applications and databases. We design automated data pipelines and workflows to eliminate repetitive manual tasks.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Modular software architecture and agile development frameworks created in-house.

featured.title: PXP Framework
featured.desc: Our leading open-source framework designed for the rapid and integrated development of web applications and critical corporate platforms. Based on clean, modular architectures and optimized for relational databases like PostgreSQL.

item1.title: Computerized Invoicing
item1.desc: Robust tax emission module, approved under current local regulations.

item2.title: Queue Management
item2.desc: Monitoring, distribution, and optimization of customer service in real-time.

item3.title: Accounting & Budgeting
item3.desc: Integrated financial statements, budgetary control, and live balance sheets.

item4.title: Fixed Assets & Warehouses
item4.desc: Valuation tracking, depreciation, and strict inventory control.

item5.title: Payroll & HR
item5.desc: Accurate calculation of salaries, tax contribution sheets, and employment history.

item6.title: Document Management (Core)
item6.desc: Structuring of document flows, digital signatures, and corporate history.

philosophy.quote: We listen to your needs, study them, and propose a solution. We develop customized software for your company and fully accompany you in the corporate implementation process.
philosophy.author: — KPLIAN Core Philosophy

pillar1.title: Uniqueness
pillar1.desc: Each company is unique and needs software solutions that respond precisely to its own operational identity.

pillar2.title: Value Creation
pillar2.desc: We believe that information technology must be the primary catalyst for business efficiency and profitability.

pillar3.title: Adaptability
pillar3.desc: The software is what must mold itself and optimize the company's processes, never the other way around.

customers.title: Trusted Clients
customers.subtitle: Critical information systems successfully implemented in major corporations in the country.

client1.desc: Development and Implementation of ERP-BOA with Accounting, Budgeting, Warehouses, Human Resources, Fixed Assets, and Treasury modules.

client2.desc: Implementation and adaptation of Warehouse, HR, and Fixed Assets modules of the centralized ERP along with custom billing.

client3.desc: Specialized design and implementation of the critical control and Industrial Maintenance system for the hydrocarbon logistics chain.

client4.desc: Complete implementation of the ERP-PXP Financial Administrative System for the control of operations of the national electric grid.

client5.desc: Technical training service and advanced consulting in comprehensive modules of ERP PXP (Security, Workflows, Purchasing).

client6.desc: Architecture and development of mobile solutions and database integrations for international hotel systems.

client7.desc: Support in the implementation of the ERP-PXP with the modules of Warehouses, Fixed Assets and Billing.

client8.desc: Architecting and solutioning cloud based systems for small startups,  large public corporations and  federal institutions.

footer.brand: High-level technological pillars for the development of scalable and corporate software solutions.
